{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Kotai Taien
| aliases = Taien
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Skysworn (novel)|Skysworn]]
}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Kotai Taien]] is a member of the [[Kotai clan]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14">''Skysworn'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Kotai Taien]] is someone [[Lindon]] associates with divine justice for his pain.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
